tasks.label: backend:check
tasks.command: ruff check . && ruff format --check . && mypy . && vulture . --min-confidence 80 && pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing -v

tasks.label: frontend:check
tasks.command: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test -- --run

tasks.label: design:check
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; TARGETS='apps/admin-web apps/miniapp apps/shared-web'; grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}([0-9a-fA-F]{3})?' $TARGETS --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' && { echo 'design:check failed: hex colors'; exit 1; } || true; grep -rE 'style=\{\{' $TARGETS --include='*.tsx' && { echo 'design:check failed: inline styles'; exit 1; } || true; [ -n "$(grep -rEl "from ['\"]lucide-react['\"]" apps/miniapp/src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -vE 'lib/icons\.ts|design-system/icons')" ] && { echo 'design:check failed: direct lucide in miniapp (use @/lib/icons)'; exit 1; } || true; F=$(grep -rl ':root' $TARGETS --include='*.css' 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E 'apps/admin-web/src/design-system/tokens/tokens\.css|apps/miniapp/src/design-system/styles/tokens/base\.css' | head -1); if [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "design:check failed: :root outside token files: $F"; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: openapi:sync
tasks.command: (cd apps/admin-api && python3 scripts/export_openapi.py) && git diff --exit-code openapi/openapi.json

tasks.label: migrate:safe
tasks.command: python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m alembic check

tasks.label: full:check
tasks.command: cd apps/admin-api && (ruff check . && ruff format --check . && mypy . && vulture . --min-confidence 80 && pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing -v) && cd ../.. && (pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test -- --run) && (set -euo pipefail; TARGETS='apps/admin-web apps/miniapp apps/shared-web'; grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}([0-9a-fA-F]{3})?' $TARGETS --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.css' && { echo 'design:check failed: hex'; exit 1; } || true; grep -rE 'style=\{\{' $TARGETS --include='*.tsx' && { echo 'design:check failed: inline styles'; exit 1; } || true; [ -n "$(grep -rEl "from ['\"]lucide-react['\"]" apps/miniapp/src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | grep -vE 'lib/icons\.ts|design-system/icons')" ] && { echo 'design:check failed: lucide'; exit 1; } || true; F=$(grep -rl ':root' $TARGETS --include='*.css' 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E 'apps/admin-web/src/design-system/tokens/tokens\.css|apps/miniapp/src/design-system/styles/tokens/base\.css' | head -1); if [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "design:check failed: :root in $F"; exit 1; fi) && (cd apps/admin-api && python3 scripts/export_openapi.py) && git diff --exit-code openapi/openapi.json && cd apps/admin-api && (python -m alembic upgrade head && python -m alembic check)
